$comment: Declares the pinned Hugging Face model revision and ONNX Runtime Web version synchronized to the VPS directory served at cdn.cutbg.art/models (SPEC.md §6, §6.1). Binaries are never committed. The immutable revision makes the CDN path safe for long-lived caching.

onnxRuntimeWeb.$comment: Must match package.json. Only the pinned Emscripten runtime variants selected dynamically by ONNX Runtime Web are synchronized from its documented jsDelivr release path.
